title: Artificial bee colony algorithm
body: In computer science and operations research, the artificial bee colony algorithm (ABC) is an optimization algorithm based on the intelligent foraging behaviour of honey bee swarm, proposed by Derviş Karaboğa (Erciyes University) in 2005.
categories: Articles lacking reliable references from April 2017
